cassette: none: reducer.PostgresCloudAssetResolutionWriter operates over one CloudAssetResolutionWrite Go value per call, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the fixture writes live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/cloud_asset_resolution_cost_test.go
description: One cross-scope cloud asset resolution correlating two distinct entity keys, driven through the production Postgres fact writer over an InstrumentedDB-wrapped counting fake. WriteCloudAssetResolution persists exactly one canonical fact record per call via canonicalReducerFactInsertQuery (no []Decision slice to batch), so eshu_dp_postgres_query_duration_seconds records exactly 1 write observation and statements_executed=1 regardless of how many entity keys the one resolution spans. Any increase — splitting one resolution into one call per entity key instead of a single call carrying both — trips the gate.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture writes in cloud_asset_resolution_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
